name: United Kingdom qualification review seed pack
change_note: Initial country seed pack with routing requirements only; official UK sources must be checked per case.

regulator_map.notes: Verify UK product safety, responsible person/importer, conformity marking, and market surveillance route.
Verify food import, labeling, allergens, claims, and business responsibilities.
Verify UK trademark status, owner, class, and territory when brand rights affect the decision.

checklist_hints: Verify UK importer/responsible person, customs/tax route, product safety, labeling, and platform-site eligibility.
Check UK-specific product marking and language obligations instead of assuming EU evidence is sufficient.

requirements.requirement: Determine the UK importer, responsible entity, customs/tax, and platform-site seller route for the product.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve until the applicable UK route is verified for regulated or imported products.
requirements.notes: Seed routing requirement; verify category-specific UK obligations.

sources.title: GOV.UK: Product safety for businesses
sources.confirms: UK product safety guidance routes businesses to category-specific product safety obligations.

sources.title: GOV.UK: Using the UKCA marking
sources.confirms: UKCA marking guidance explains marking obligations for goods placed on the market in Great Britain where applicable.

sources.title: GOV.UK: Import goods into the UK
sources.confirms: UK import guidance covers customs, declarations, duty, VAT, licenses, and other controls for imported goods.

sources.title: GOV.UK: Search for a trade mark
sources.confirms: UK trademark records can be searched to verify trademark ownership, status, class, and territory.

gaps: Add current official UK sources for product safety, food, cosmetics, electronics, toys, and customs/tax routes.
Add golden cases before marking validated.
